zh.lifeSummary: Emma Donne of Utkinton是Sir Richard Donne of Utkinton的女兒，出生。她於大約1257年與Richard Molyneux of Melling在英國藍卡爾澤福頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年。

zh-hans.Little Crosby, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾蕾托 哥羅士比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Emma Donne of Utkinton是Sir Richard Donne of Utkinton的女儿，出生。她于大约1257年与Richard Molyneux of Melling在英国藍卡爾澤福頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年。

nameMeanings.name: Donne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dunn
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinn, Ó Doinn ‘descendant of Donn’, a byname meaning ‘brown-haired’ or ‘chieftain’. Compare Dunne . This name has sometimes been Anglicized as Brown .
English: nickname for a dark complexioned or swarthy man, from Middle English dun ‘dun, dark’ (Old English dunn ‘dull brown’).
Scottish: habitational name from Dun in Angus, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’. Compare Dun .

variants.name: Done
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Alfredo, Angel, Berto, Cristobal, Dinora, Eloisa, Francisco, Generoso, Gustavo, Juan.
English: variant of Donne, itself a variant of Dunn .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: Emma Donne of Utkinton was born as the daughter of Sir Richard Donne of Utkinton. She married Richard Molyneux of Melling about 1257, in Sefton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1300.

fr.lifeSummary: Emma Donne of Utkinton est née, fille de Sir Richard Donne of Utkinton. Elle a épousé Richard Molyneux of Melling environ 1257, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1300.

de.lifeSummary: Emma Donne of Utkinton wurde, als Tochter von Sir Richard Donne of Utkinton geboren. Sie hat um 1257 in Sefton, Lancashire, England Richard Molyneux of Melling geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1300.

it.lifeSummary: Emma Donne of Utkinton è nata il come figlia di Sir Richard Donne of Utkinton. Lei sposato Richard Molyneux of Melling circa 1257, nel Sefton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1300.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma Donne of UtkintonはSir Richard Donne of Utkintonの娘として生まれた。約1257年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンでRichard Molyneux of Mellingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma Donne of Utkinton(은)는 Sir Richard Donne of Utkinton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1257년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 Richard Molyneux of Melling(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 사망했다.

mn.Sefton,Lancashire,England: Sefton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Emma Donne of Utkinton nasceu filha de Sir Richard Donne of Utkinton. Ela casou-se com Richard Molyneux of Melling aproximadamente 1257, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1300.

ru.lifeSummary: Emma Donne of Utkinton родилась. Её отца звали Sir Richard Donne of Utkinton. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Molyneux of Melling около 1257 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1300 г.

es.lifeSummary: Emma Donne of Utkinton nació como hija de Sir Richard Donne of Utkinton. Se casó con Richard Molyneux of Melling aproximadamente 1257, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1300.
